news.summary: In The Woodlands, Texas, NPK International Inc. (NYSE: NPKI) disclosed plans to release its Q1 2025 results post the U.S. market closure on May 1, 2025. A conference call is scheduled for May 2, 2025, at 9:30 a.m. ET to discuss the financial outcomes and engage in a Q&A session. An online broadcast of the call and presentation materials will be accessible in the Investor Relations section.
news.headline: NPK International to release Q1 2025 results on May 1, conference call on May 2 at 9:30 am ET.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, VDE Americas and kWh Analytics have partnered to introduce a new assessment form focusing on solar site hail vulnerability and protective measures. VDE Americas is renowned for providing technical advisory and catastrophic risk assessment services for the solar power sector, while kWh Analytics specializes in Climate Insurance and offers differentiated premiums based on the resiliency of renewable energy assets. This initiative comes as North America's hail season kicks off in April.
news.headline: VDE Americas & kWh Analytics partner to optimize insurance for solar assets against hail damages at the start of North America's hail season.

news.summary: Soluna Holdings, Inc., a green data center developer specializing in Bitcoin mining and AI applications, disclosed that it has secured a power contract for Project Ellen. This initiative involves a 100MW data center situated alongside a 145MW wind farm in South Texas. The wind farm belongs to a prominent renewable energy and sustainable infrastructure company, serving as Soluna's new power partner. The project signifies a notable advancement in Soluna's efforts to expand its operations and promote environmentally friendly computing solutions.
news.headline: Soluna plans to build a new 100MW data center in Texas powered by a 145MW wind farm.(Character count: 76)

news.summary: SuperPlay, an Israeli gaming studio acquired by Playtika, has launched a new game globally on April 17, 2025. This collaboration is the first game release after the acquisition. This marks a significant milestone for SuperPlay, as they join forces with Playtika to expand their reach.
news.headline: SuperPlay reveals new game Disney Solitaire after Playtika acquisition. Global release marks first launch with 10 million players.

news.summary: In Beverly, Massachusetts, on April 17, 2025, Axcelis Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: ACLS), a prominent supplier of ion implantation solutions for the semiconductor sector, announced they will unveil their financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2025 before the market opens on Tuesday, May 6th. This news provides insight into the company's recent performance and sets the stage for investors and analysts to assess their progress. Stay tuned for further details on their financial standing.
news.headline: Axcelis (Nasdaq: ACLS) to release Q1 2025 results on May 6, before market opening. Leading semiconductor solutions provider.

news.summary: A technology company based in Plano, Texas, Alkami Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALKT), a prominent provider of cloud-based digital banking solutions for U.S. financial institutions, has disclosed its intention to unveil its financial performance for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2025.
news.headline: Alkami Technology (Nasdaq: ALKT) to announce Q1 2025 financial results for March 31. Leading digital banking provider in U.S.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, in Vilnius, Lithuania, the leading European cryptocurrency exchange based on traffic, WhiteBIT, was honored to be a Golden Partner at Liquidity 2025, an esteemed Institutional Digital Asset Summit organized by LTP. At the event, WhiteBIT showcased its newest range of institutional services to an engaged audience.
news.headline: WhiteBIT, largest European crypto exchange, is a Golden Partner at Liquidity 2025 summit unveiling new institutional services.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, in Minneapolis, it was reported that Castlelake L.P. ("Castlelake"), a well-established global alternative investment manager with two decades of experience in asset-based private market investments, has recently made a deal with Invictus Capital Partners ("Invictus"). This agreement signifies an important step for Castlelake, showcasing their dedication to strategic partnerships within the industry. The specific terms of the agreement, including financial details and potential implications, are expected to be released in the near future. Castlelake's extensive experience in private markets, combined with this new collaboration, highlights their commitment to continued growth and innovation in the financial sector.
news.headline: Castlelake and Invictus team up to invest in $2 billion of residential loans, leveraging Castlelake's 20 years of experience.

news.summary: A leading site survey company operating nationwide has become the latest addition to MasonMade's portfolio, incorporating cutting-edge technology. On April 17, 2025, MasonMade Ventures revealed its acquisition of Field Services Unlimited (FSU), a company specializing in architectural site surveys across the country. This move showcases MasonMade's commitment to expanding its portfolio with innovative and advanced technological solutions in the field.
news.headline: MasonMade Ventures acquires nationwide site survey company FSU, first addition to their portfolio. NEW YORK, April 17, 2025.

news.summary: In a historic move, an iconic automotive event is set to carry on under the supervision of local leadership, with guidance from the La Jolla Historical Society. Taking place in La Jolla, California, the event is slated to continue its legacy and foster growth under this new direction. The upcoming event, scheduled for April 17, 2025, is expected to witness significant participation and support. Events.com, renowned for its role in event discovery, management, and sponsorship on a worldwide scale, is aiding in the organization of this pivotal automotive gathering. The collaboration is poised to elevate the event's prominence and ensure its enduring appeal.
news.headline: Events.com acquires La Jolla Concours d'Elegance, a landmark automotive event in California. Local leadership to continue with focus on growth and legacy.

news.summary: In Chicago on April 17, 2025, ShipBob, a prominent global supply chain and fulfillment platform catering to small and medium-sized businesses along with mid-market ecommerce merchants, unveiled a fresh collaboration and integration with Temu, a rapidly expanding global online entity.
news.headline: ShipBob partners with Temu, boosting sales for U.S SMEs; integration set to create new opportunities.

news.summary: Pinpoint Predictive, an actuarial AI platform for property and casualty insurers, based in San Mateo, California, achieved a significant milestone by obtaining certification from ZwillGen's AI Division on April 17, 2025. This certification demonstrates the platform's commitment to ethical and unbiased risk selection for insurers. By empowering carriers with the ability to quantify risk accurately, Pinpoint Predictive plays a crucial role in enhancing decision-making processes within the industry, ultimately leading to improved outcomes. This milestone emphasizes the growing importance of AI in the insurance sector, with Pinpoint Predictive serving as a leading player in this evolving landscape.
news.headline: Pinpoint Predictive receives fairness certification from ZwillGen's AI division, setting standards for ethical AI in insurance.

news.summary: A newly developed model utilizing post-pandemic data has been introduced, incorporating unique patent-pending features that significantly boost predictive capability. This model has shown a potential increase of up to 9% in unsecured loan approvals specifically for consumers with limited credit history. Furthermore, it boasts superior stability in credit score modeling, leading to a reduction in fluctuations seen in consumer credit scores. The development is based in San Francisco.
news.headline: VantageScore® unveils 5.0 credit score model trained on post-pandemic data, providing up to 9% lift on unsecured loan originations.

news.summary: A seasoned business leader, with experience at Confluent and Salesforce, has recently joined Neuron7.ai, a company based in San Jose, California that specializes in AI-driven service resolution. This move comes as Neuron7.ai aims to further establish itself in the market with innovative approaches to service solutions. The announcement was made on April 17, 2025.
news.headline: Neuron7.ai appoints Genesys CSO Larry Shurtz to Board; validates AI-driven service resolution approach.

news.summary: In Warren, New Jersey on April 17, 2025, PTC Therapeutics, Inc. revealed plans to conduct a webcast conference call to release its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 and discuss the company's progress and future direction. The event is scheduled for Tuesday, May 6, starting at 4:30 PM. PTC Therapeutics trades on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol PTCT.
news.headline: PTC Therapeutics (NASDAQ: PTCT) to host conference call on May 6 at 4:30 PM to discuss Q1 2025 financial results.

news.summary: For the second year in a row, BorgWarner has secured a spot on Newsweek's list of Most Trustworthy Companies in America. The automotive company from Auburn Hills, Michigan, has improved its position within the Automotive & Components industry category. This recognition was officially announced on April 17, 2025. BorgWarner's consistent performance has led to this achievement in being recognized as one of the most reliable companies in the country.
news.headline: BorgWarner awarded for Most Trustworthy Companies in America list for 2nd year, ranking higher in Automotive & Components.

news.summary: A renowned Ophthalmology CRO, recognized for more than ten years, is expanding its exceptional standards to Oncology. Located in Research Triangle Park, North Carolina, the company, Powered Research, announced on April 17, 2025, its foray into oncology research. Specializing in non-GLP models, Powered Research is a prominent preclinical CRO in the industry.
news.headline: Powered Research expands services to Oncology, launching at AACR Annual Meeting 2025 in Chicago. Booth #3154. #researchtrianglepark #PRNewswire

news.summary: Adjusted EBITDA increased by 59% year over year to $2.3 million, with a net income generated at $1.2 million.
news.headline: Cycurion's full year 2024 financial results show adjusted EBITDA of $2.3M (+59% y/y) and net income of $1.2M.

news.summary: A recent patent grant has significantly enhanced Hoth Therapeutics, Inc.'s RNA therapeutics pipeline, providing extensive coverage for KIT-targeted antisense oligomers in the fields of oncology and immunology. The patent, approved on April 17, 2025, includes broad claims that bolster Hoth's portfolio in developing innovative treatments. This development marks a pivotal moment for the clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, listed on NASDAQ as HOTH, as it further solidifies its position in advancing novel therapies.
news.headline: Hoth Therapeutics granted Japanese patent for RNA-based cancer therapy targeting KIT Gene, strengthening global precision oncology IP.

news.summary: In the U.S., Plaid has recently collaborated with MoneyGram as its pay-by-bank facilitator, aiming to enhance payment efficiency and security for numerous customers across the nation. The partnership was formally announced on April 17, 2025, in Dallas. MoneyGram, recognized as a prominent global payments network catering to consumers, businesses, and communities, is anticipated to significantly benefit from this collaboration.

The company's management will conduct a live conference call and webcast on April 28, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET. news.summary: Engineered to withstand harsh environments and extreme conditions, radiation-resistant MOSFETs are offered with a range of total ionizing doses, from 100 Krad to 300 Krad.
news.headline: Microchip releases radiation-hardened MOSFETs up to 300 Krad TID, meeting MIL-PRF-19500/746 and JANSF standards.

news.summary: Allegro MicroSystems, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALGM) revealed intentions to unveil financial data for Q4 and fiscal year 2025 on May 8, 2025, before the market opens. President and CEO Mike Doogue, alongside EVP and CFO Derek D’Antilio, will lead a conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to analyze the results and business prospects.

news.summary: WellStar Health System plans to showcase a new strategy driven by bio-visual analytics (BVA) that has resulted in a notable decrease in kidney injury cases after left ventricular assist device (LVAD) implantation. The implementation of this approach has led to a reduction of up to 30% in post-implantation kidney complications. This innovative strategy is set to be a focal point of discussion and presentation at an upcoming event.
news.headline: Daxor Corp to present blood volume analysis at MedAxiom Cardiovascular Transforum Spring 2025; WellStar Health reduces kidney injury post LVAD using BVA.

news.summary: Actuate Therapeutics, a biopharmaceutical company trading under NASDAQ symbol ACTU, will present data on elraglusib's efficacy in advanced salivary gland carcinoma at the American Association for Cancer Research Annual Meeting 2025. The event is scheduled from April 25th to 30th at McCormick Place Convention Center in Chicago, IL. Actuate focuses on developing treatments for challenging cancers by targeting glycogen synthase kinase-3 beta (GSK-3β). The abstracts of the presentation will be available in the AACR's online Proceedings.
news.headline: Actuate to present elraglusib data for salivary gland carcinoma at AACR Annual Meeting 2025 in Chicago.

news.summary: This news release is specifically targeted for distribution within Canada and is not intended for dissemination to United States newswire services or for circulation in the United States.
news.headline: Doman Building Materials Group Ltd. will release Q1 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025 in Canada. No US distribution.

news.summary: In Watertown, Massachusetts, on April 17, 2025, Werewolf Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: HOWL), a biopharmaceutical company focusing on developing conditionally activated therapeutics to enhance the immune system for cancer and other immune-related illnesses, named Steven Bloom as their new Chief Business Officer. With over 35 years of expertise in life sciences, Bloom has led various teams in corporate development, commercial planning, corporate affairs, and strategic consulting.
news.headline: Werewolf Therapeutics appoints Steven Bloom as Chief Business Officer, leveraging his 35 years of life sciences experience.

news.summary: Today in Rockaway, New Jersey, electroCore, Inc. (Nasdaq: ECOR) revealed new findings at the 2025 International Brain Injury Association World Congress. The data emphasized the success of gammaCore® non-invasive vagus nerve stimulation (nVNS) in addressing symptoms of concussions linked to mild traumatic brain injury (mTBI). This showcases the potential of this bioelectronic medicine and wellness company’s technology in improving outcomes for individuals with mTBI.
news.headline: gammaCore nVNS effective in treating concussive symptoms associated with mTBI; presented at 2025 International Brain Injury Association World Congress by electroCore, Inc. (Nasdaq: ECOR) - Rockaway, N.J., April 17, 2025.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, NowVertical Group Inc. (TSXV: NOW), a prominent data and AI solutions provider, introduced its primary DataCatalyst Solution on the Microsoft Azure Marketplace. This move emphasizes the Company's strategic focus on enterprise AI, data infrastructure modernization, and expansion within the Microsoft ecosystem.
news.headline: NowVertical Group launches DataCatalyst on Microsoft Azure Marketplace, targeting enterprise AI, TSXV: NOW, April 17, 2025.

news.summary: Jennifer Banner has been acknowledged for her dedicated service spanning a decade. She has demonstrated unwavering commitment and hard work over the past 10 years.
news.headline: Uniti Group Inc. nominates Harold Zeitz for its Board of Directors. Jennifer Banner acknowledged for 10 years of service.

news.summary: In Monaco on April 17, 2025, Costamare Inc. (NYSE:CMRE) disclosed the approval from its Board of Directors for the planned spin-off of its dry bulk business into a separate entity, Costamare Bulkers Holdings Limited ("Costamare Bulkers"). The Company is set to finalize this process by distributing proportionally to Costamare Inc. shareholders on May 6, 2025.
news.headline: Costamare Inc. (NYSE:CMRE) to spin off dry bulk business into Costamare Bulkers Holdings Limited by May 6, 2025.

news.summary: EINDHOVEN, The Netherlands - NXP Semiconductors N.V. disclosed plans to unveil their financial performance for Q1 of 2025 post the regular trading hours on NASDAQ Global Select Market by April 28, 2025. They are set to hold a conference call for investors on April 29, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. EDT. The company operates under the NASDAQ symbol NXPI.
news.headline: NXP Semiconductors to reveal Q1 2025 financial results on April 28 after NASDAQ trading, with call on April 29 at 8:00 am EDT.

news.summary: A conference call has been scheduled to take place at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time.
news.headline: Ardelyx will report Q1 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025, with the conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET.

news.summary: A copy trading bot on the Solana network is emphasizing speed, boasting that approximately 15% of trades are executed in the same block as the mirrored wallet.
news.headline: Odinbot's Solana copy trading achieves 'Zero Block Latency,' with 15% trades in the same block as the wallet.

news.summary: Mantra's OM token price collapsed by over 90% on April 13, dropping from $6.30 to below $0.50, raising concerns about market manipulation and liquidity issues within the crypto industry. At least 43.6 million OM tokens, valued at $227 million, were moved to exchanges before the crash, sparking allegations of insider dumping. Mantra CEO denied claims of large-scale token transfers and stated that the crash didn't involve token sales by the project. The collapse was attributed to forced liquidations on centralized exchanges during low-liquidity hours. The event underscores broader issues within the crypto industry. Bitcoin also experienced a correction on April 6, dropping below $75,000 due to weekend trading volume constraints. The incident highlights the need for more decentralized exchanges. The reasons behind the OM collapse remain unclear, with ongoing investigations into the sudden movement of tokens.
news.headline: OM token crash reveals liquidity issues in crypto, price drops 90% to below $0.50 triggering market manipulation claims. Rapid movement of 43.6M OM tokens worth $227M to exchanges before crash. Exchange points to insider dumping. BTC also impacted with $75K correction on April 6.

news.summary: Cizzle Brands Corporation, listed on Cboe Canada as CZZL, OTCQB as CZZLF, and Frankfurt as 8YF, recently shared that Fortinos, a Loblaw banner supermarket chain, integrated CWENCH Hydration™ in ready-to-drink ("RTD") format into all 24 of its establishments in the Greater Toronto and Greater Hamilton areas in Southern Ontario. The rollout of the four initial flavors of CWENCH Hydration™ RTD commenced on Thursday, April.
news.headline: Cizzle Brands expands CWENCH Hydration™ availability to all 24 Fortinos locations in Ontario.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, hard disk drives (HDDs) are vital components of cloud data center infrastructure, incorporating rare earth elements (REEs) such as Neodymium (Nd), Praseodymium (Pr), and Dysprosium (Dy) for their magnetic properties. HDDs combine material science, mechanical engineering, and physics in their design. Despite their importance, conventional recycling processes typically reclaim only a small portion of these critical materials.
news.headline: US launches program to capture rare earth materials from hard disk drives, vital for cloud data centers. HDDs use Neodymium, Praseodymium, and Dysprosium but current recycling methods recover only a fraction.

news.summary: Clearwater Analytics (CWAN) and Enfusion, Inc. (ENFN) released initial data on Enfusion shareholders' preferences for the merger consideration in Clearwater's acquisition of Enfusion. Shareholders were required to make their choice by 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The announcement did not specify the exact figures or percentages of shareholder elections. This transaction marks a significant development for the two companies as they move forward with the merger process.
news.headline: Clearwater Analytics and Enfusion announce preliminary results of Enfusion shareholders' merger consideration elections.(NYSE: CWAN) (NYSE: ENFN)

news.summary: Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. intends to disclose financial outcomes for Q4 and full fiscal year 2025, wrapping up on March 31, 2025, post-market hours on Thursday, May 15, 2025. The company will host an earnings call to review the results at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time, accessible via dialing 800-715-9871 or (646) 307-1963 with conference ID: 1162777. Furthermore, a live webcast and call replay will be available.
news.headline: Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. will report Q4 and FY 2025 results on May 15, 2025, at 4:30pm ET. Conference call details: 800-715-9871 or (646) 307-1963 (ID: 1162777).

news.summary: In New York, TDS Gift Cards, a segment of Ziff Davis, Inc. (NASDAQ: ZD), a prominent gift card growth solutions provider, has revealed a significant partnership with Card Compliant, a top compliance company for prepaid cards and payment methods. This collaboration focuses on delivering a comprehensive gift card issuance and program management service for businesses, particularly high-growth online and app-centric brands under TDS. The alliance with Card Compliant capitalizes on the innovative CIMI Card, offering a complete solution for merchants.
news.headline: TDS Gift Cards partners with Card Compliant to enhance gift card issuance and management for online brands. NASDAQ: ZD involved.

news.summary: In Seattle, a recent report by Redfin revealed that the nationwide median home-sale price increased by 2.6% year over year in the four weeks leading up to April 13, as per NASDAQ: RDFN. This growth rate remained consistent with the previous month but was a decrease from the 5% to 6% seen at the end of 2024 and beginning of 2025. In 10 out of the 50 most populous metro areas in the U.S., the median home-sale price was lower compared to the previous year. For more information, one can refer to redfin.com.
news.headline: Home-price growth losing steam - median price up 2.6% YoY, down from 5-6% in 2024-2025. Over 10 metros see price drop.
